title: Citation Remediation — source-link/accept-citation commands + 106 node remediation

issues.title: Citation Remediation — add source-link/accept-citation commands and remediate 106 uncited nodes
issues.scope: internal/ops/types.go, internal/materialize/state.go, internal/materialize/engine.go, internal/traceability/traceability.go, internal/materialize/pipeline.go, internal/validate/validate.go, cmd/trellis/validate.go, cmd/trellis/main.go, cmd/trellis/source_link.go, cmd/trellis/accept_citation.go
issues.dod: trls validate reports COVERAGE: 106/106 cited (N source-linked, M accepted-risk) with no ERROR lines; trls source-link and trls accept-citation commands implemented; make check green
notes: Adds citation-accepted op type, CitationAcceptance materialize state, two new CLI commands
Chunk 1 (T1-T6): foundation — op type, materialize, traceability, validation
Chunk 2 (T7-T8): commands — source-link and accept-citation
Chunk 3 (T9-T11): retroactive remediation — data-only, requires Chunk 1+2 green
Spec: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-23-citation-remediation-design.md

issues.title: Register citation-accepted op type and ConfirmedNoninteractively payload field
issues.dod: OpCitationAccepted constant in ValidOpTypes; ConfirmedNoninteractively bool field in Payload; TestOpCitationAccepted_RegisteredInValidOpTypes passes; make check green
notes: Create internal/ops/types_test.go (does not exist yet)
Add OpCitationAccepted = "citation-accepted" to constants and ValidOpTypes map
Add ConfirmedNoninteractively bool json:"confirmed_noninteractively,omitempty" to Payload struct
Payload.Rationale already exists — do not add a duplicate
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): add citation-accepted op type and payload field

issues.title: Add CitationAcceptance struct and CitationAcceptances field to materialize state + engine apply case
issues.dod: CitationAcceptance struct in state.go; CitationAcceptances []CitationAcceptance field on Issue; applyCitationAccepted method in engine; TestApplyCitationAccepted and TestApplyCitationAccepted_UnknownIssue_NoError pass; make check green
notes: Add CitationAcceptance struct after SourceLink struct in state.go
Add CitationAcceptances []CitationAcceptance field after SourceLinks field on Issue
Add case ops.OpCitationAccepted: return s.applyCitationAccepted(op) in engine Apply switch
applyCitationAccepted follows same pattern as applySourceLink — direct field mutation on *Issue
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): add CitationAcceptance to materialize state and engine

issues.title: Update traceability — add CitationAcceptanceCount to IssueRef and AcceptedRiskNodes/AcceptedRiskPct to Coverage
issues.dod: CitationAcceptanceCount int on IssueRef; AcceptedRiskNodes int and AcceptedRiskPct float64 on Coverage; Compute updated; TestCompute_AllSourceLinked, TestCompute_MixedCitation, TestCompute_BothSourceLinkAndAcceptance_CountsAsSourceLinked pass; make check green
notes: traceability_test.go uses package traceability_test (external) — new tests follow same style
CitedNodes = source-linked + accepted-risk; AcceptedRiskNodes = accepted-risk only (no source link)
A node with both SourceLinkCount>0 and CitationAcceptanceCount>0 counts as source-linked, not accepted-risk
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): extend traceability coverage to track accepted-risk citations

issues.title: Update pipeline toTraceabilityRefs to populate CitationAcceptanceCount
issues.dod: toTraceabilityRefs populates CitationAcceptanceCount from len(issue.CitationAcceptances); TestToTraceabilityRefs_PopulatesCitationAcceptanceCount passes; make check green
notes: toTraceabilityRefs is package-private — test must be in package materialize (add to engine_test.go)
Function is called from both Materialize and MaterializeAndReturn; change the function once
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): populate CitationAcceptanceCount in traceability refs

issues.title: Update validator — citation-accepted satisfies citation requirement
issues.dod: checkE7E8E12Citations treats CitationAcceptances as satisfying citation; TestValidate_CitationAccepted_SatisfiesCitationRequirement, TestValidate_CitationAccepted_NoManifest_CitationCheckSkipped, TestValidate_SourceLinkOnly_ManifestMembershipChecked pass; make check green
notes: citation-accepted does not require manifest membership check — only source-link does
No manifest → citation check skipped entirely (preserve existing behaviour)
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): treat citation-accepted as satisfying citation requirement in validator

issues.title: Update validate command coverage output format (human + JSON)
issues.dod: Human format: 'COVERAGE: N/M cited' (or 'N/M cited (X source-linked, Y accepted-risk)' when accepted-risk>0); JSON format includes coverage object; TestValidateCmd_CoverageOutput_HumanFormat passes; make check green
notes: Replace the entire if format==json {...} else {...} block in validate.go
sourceLinked = cov.CitedNodes - cov.AcceptedRiskNodes
Run make check after T6 — all of Chunk 1 must be green before starting Chunk 2
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): update validate coverage output format

issues.title: Implement trls source-link command
issues.dod: trls source-link --issue ID --source-id UUID emits source-link op; validates source-id exists in manifest; TestSourceLinkCmd_HappyPath, TestSourceLinkCmd_UnknownSourceID, TestSourceLinkCmd_MissingIssue, TestSourceLinkCmd_MissingSourceID, TestSourceLinkCmd_MakesNodeCited pass; make check green
notes: Create cmd/trellis/source_link.go with newSourceLinkCmd()
Register in cmd/trellis/main.go
Unknown source-id returns error 'unknown source'
Output: 'Linked ISSUE-ID to SOURCE-UUID'
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): add trls source-link command

issues.title: Implement trls accept-citation command with interactive confirmation and --ci flag
issues.dod: trls accept-citation --issue ID --rationale TEXT emits citation-accepted op; rationale must be >=3 words; --ci bypasses interactive prompt; TestAcceptCitationCmd_CI_HappyPath, TestAcceptCitationCmd_RationaleTooShort, TestAcceptCitationCmd_TwoWords_Rejected, TestAcceptCitationCmd_ThreeWords_Accepted, TestAcceptCitationCmd_MissingIssue, TestAcceptCitationCmd_MissingRationale pass; make check green
notes: Create cmd/trellis/accept_citation.go with newAcceptCitationCmd()
Register in cmd/trellis/main.go
Interactive mode: use golang.org/x/term (already in dep graph) for TTY detection
Interactive prompt: ask user to type issue ID exactly to confirm
--ci flag skips interactive prompt and sets ConfirmedNoninteractively=true
Output: 'Citation risk accepted for ISSUE-ID'
Commit: feat(E5-S0-ext): add trls accept-citation command with interactive confirmation

issues.title: Register 19 planning docs as citation sources

Register: E3 Collaboration, CI Validation Pipeline, Test Coverage Hardening
Register: E4 Index, E4-S1 through E4-S9 plans
Capture UUIDs for use in T10
Commit: chore(E5-S0-ext): register planning docs as citation sources

issues.title: Emit source-link ops for all properly-sourceable issues (E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5)
issues.dod: source-link ops emitted for all issues in the E2/E3/CI/TC/E4/E5 mapping; trls validate uncited count decreasing to single digits; ops committed

Retrieve source UUIDs from manifest, do not hardcode

issues.title: Accept-citation for straggler issues with no recoverable source material

Expected stragglers: task-1773804403, task-1773804476, story-1773804400
Rationale: 'Created before planning doc convention existed; no recoverable source material.'
Use --ci flag if running non-interactively

issues.title: Final verification — make check green and trls validate 106/106 cited
issues.dod: make check passes (lint + test + coverage >=80% + mutation); trls validate shows COVERAGE: 106/106 cited (N source-linked, M accepted-risk) with no ERROR lines
